sutta: buddha said monks there are these 5 disadvantages to 1 wanting in morals failing in morals what 5 consider amongst the monk without morals failing in morals he comes to suffer much loss in wealth through neglect this month is the first disadvantage to 1 wanting in morals failing and morals or an evil rumor spreads about him this is a second disadvantage or whatever group he approach whether nobles or brahmins householders or recluses he does so without confidence and confused this is the third disadvantage or he dies muddled in thought this is the fourth disadvantage or on the breaking up of the body after death he arises in the wayward way the ill way the abyss hell this is the fifth disadvantage verily monks these are the 5 disadvantages to 1 wanting in morals failing in morals so in this if a person feels to keep the precepts 5 disadvantages for lola 1 is he suffers loss of wealth true neglect why because if a person breaks the precepts for example he takes to liquor or he romanizes how he gambles and etc then he comes to neglect his duties so he suffers loss of wealth the second 1 he gets a bad reputation people say this guy he is under uh kills animals or he lies or he cheats or he um steals others property or he seduces another's husband or wife or he's a drunkard etc he gets a bad reputation the third 1 because he does not keep the precepts now he does not have the confidence like he does things he has to be ashamed of so whenever he approached a company of people he approaches them without confidence the fourth 1 is he here it says he dies muddle in thought there are 2 aspects here 1 is when a person grows older if he does not keep the precepts a lot of remorse arises and because of remorse that person becomes mentally disturbed so that a person it is seen that people who do not keep the precepts are liable to become senile at a younger age sometimes some people in their 50s they become senile talk a lot of nonsense because they have a lot of remorse the heart is disturbed another aspect is when a person is about to pass away if the person does not keep the precepts then he's afraid to die so when the dying moment comes and that person is very scared because there's no blessings no merit to support that person the last 1 is after death he arises in the warfall plains these are the disadvantages the next suta
